commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=0e83d2c5022149b140cf8f4d9278773a343ac175)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a 64-entry LRU-style cap around `src/agents/bootstrap-cache.ts` and extends its Vitest coverage for bounded churn and eviction.

PR surface: Source +26, Tests +56. Total +82 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection on current main shows a session-keyed bootstrap snapshot `Map` with no cap or eviction, and the normal bootstrap run path can populate it for distinct session keys.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review should decide the canonical implementation and request real-path proof; there is no safe automated repair lane for contributor-supplied runtime evidence.

target.title: fix(agents): cap bootstrap-cache at 64 entries with LRU eviction
target.body:
Fixes #88148

## Summary

The bootstrap-cache stored one workspace snapshot per session key with no upper bound. Long-running gateways accumulate one `Map` entry per distinct session key, growing resident memory without limit over time.

This PR caps the cache at 64 entries. When a new entry would exceed the cap, the oldest (least-recently-used) entry is evicted. JavaScript's `Map` preserves insertion order, so the first key is always the oldest. Active sessions are moved to the end of the insertion order on each access, keeping frequently-used keys hot.

## Real behavior proof

**Behavior addressed:** Cache grew to one entry per distinct session key with no eviction. After 64 unique session keys, the cache still holds 64 entries and the oldest key is evicted when the 65th is added.

**Real environment tested:** Linux x86_64, Node.js v22.22.0, HEAD `0e83d2c5022149b140cf8f4d9278773a343ac175` based on `origin/main` `642f85dc5b951dc8e252ec51b8e242d3d233c167`.

**Exact steps or command run after this patch:**

```bash
OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run \  --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts \  src/agents/bootstrap-cache.test.ts \  --reporter=verbose --testTimeout=15000
```

**Evidence after fix:**

```
 ✓ bootstrap cache size cap > stays bounded at BOOTSTRAP_CACHE_MAX_SIZE under churn
 ✓ bootstrap cache size cap > evicts the oldest key when the cap is reached
 ✓ bootstrap cache size cap > refreshes access order so recently used keys survive eviction
 (+ 6 existing tests)
 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  9 passed (9)
```

**Observed result after fix:** After 65 unique session keys, `cache.size === 64`. The oldest key is evicted; recently accessed keys survive eviction.

**What was not tested:** Memory profiling against a live long-running gateway to measure heap reduction. The cache-size bound and eviction order are verified by unit tests using the real `Map` implementation.
target.author: alix-007
